headline: SBX Group and SEE Bring the Sistine Chapel to Las Vegas
summary: The New Permanent Immersive Exhibition Comes To Life onApril 24 at The Shops at Crystals Link to Media Kit LAS VEGAS, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SBX Group and SEE are proud to announce the Las Vegas debut of Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel: The Exhibition®, which will open on Friday, April 24 at The Shops at Crystals. Bringing one of the world’s most iconic artistic achievements within reach, the exhibition offers guests the opportunity to experience Michelangelo’s masterpieces up close an
